g.text: Fixed allowlist: file reads, search, code navigation
Auto mode drops broad interpreter escapes (python, node, ruby)
File writes/edits inside the project directory
Reviewable via version control — no latency cost
Shell commands, web fetches, external tools,
subagent spawns, filesystem ops outside project
Stage 1: fast yes/no filter → Stage 2: chain-of-thought reasoning
Only real downside potential reaches here
